locations.name: Town Square
locations.description:
The bustling centre of Stonehaven. Merchants hawk their wares
and townsfolk hurry about their business. A stone fountain
gurgles at the centre of the cobblestoned plaza.

locations.name: Market District
locations.description:
Colourful stalls line both sides of the narrow street. The air
is thick with the smell of spices, leather, and fresh bread.
A peculiar old woman eyes you from behind a cart of potions.

locations.name: Blacksmith's Forge
locations.description:
The rhythmic clanging of hammer on anvil fills the smoky shop.
Weapons and armour of all kinds hang from the walls. The
muscular smith nods at you without breaking his rhythm.

locations.name: The Rusty Flagon
locations.description:
Rough-hewn tables fill a dimly lit common room. A fire crackles
in the hearth. Several adventurers nurse their drinks and whisper
of dangers in the nearby Darkwood Forest.

locations.name: South Gate
locations.description:
A pair of bored guards lean on their spears beside the massive
iron gate. Beyond it, a rutted road leads into the unknown.
One guard points north. 'Town's that way, traveller.'

locations.name: Darkwood Forest
locations.description:
Ancient trees blot out the sun. Strange sounds echo through
the gloom and pairs of yellow eyes glint between the trunks.
This place feels dangerous. Proceed with caution.
